post.description: This operation creates a resource group. A Milvus instance begins with a default resource group that includes all available query nodes. You can create additional resource groups, reassign specific query nodes from the default group, and load collections into the query nodes in these newly configured groups. This operation always succeeds no matter whether the resource group exists.

zh-CN.description: 本操作创建资源组。Milvus 实例在启动后创建一个默认资源组，包含所有可用的 QueryNodes。您可以创建其他资源组，将部分 QueryNodes 从默认组重新分配到这些新配置的组中，并将 Collection 加载到这些新配置的组中的 QueryNodes 上。无论资源组是否存在，此操作都始终成功。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

name.description: The name of the resource group to create.

config.description: The configurations of the resource group to create.

requests.description: The number of query nodes to allocate to the resource group.

zh-CN.description: 资源组中需要的 QueryNodes 的数量。

node_num.description: The number of query nodes to allocate to the resource group.

zh-CN.description: 资源组中需要的 QueryNodes 的数量。

limits.description: The maximum number of query nodes to allocate to the resource group.

zh-CN.description: 资源组中需要的 QueryNodes 的最大数量。

node_num.description: The maximum number of query nodes to allocate to the resource group.

zh-CN.description: 资源组中需要的 QueryNodes 的最大数量。

transfer_from.description: The list of source resource groups to transfer query nodes from.

zh-CN.description: 需要从哪些源资源组中转移 QueryNodes。

items.description: A source resource group to transfer query nodes from.

resource_group.description: The name of the source resource group to transfer query nodes from.

transfer_to.description: The list of target resource groups to transfer query nodes to.

zh-CN.description: 需要将 QueryNodes 转移到哪些目标资源组中。

items.description: A target resource group to transfer query nodes to.

resource_group.description: The name of the target resource group to transfer query nodes to.

data.description: Response payload which is an empty object.

post.description: This operation updates the configuration of the specified resource group.

zh-CN.description: 本操作更新指定资源组的配置。

resource_groups.description: The configurations of the resource group to update. You can include multiple resource groups in the request body with the name of each resource group as the key and its configuration as the value.

zh-CN.description: 需要更新的资源组配置。请求体中可以包含多个资源组的配置，每个资源组的名称作为键，其配置作为值。

post.description: This operation drops the specified resource group.

zh-CN.description: 本操作删除指定资源组。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

post.description: This operation transfers the replicas of the specified collection from the source resource group to the target resource group.

zh-CN.description: 本操作将指定 Collection 的副本从源资源组转移到目标资源组。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

sourceRgName.description: The name of the source resource group.

targetRgName.description: The name of the target resource group.

collectionName.description: The name of the target collection.

replicaNum.description: The number of replicas to transfer.

data.description: Response payload which is an empty object.
